The '''T-81 airspeeder''' was developed by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]], sometime after the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. They could carry several passengers.

[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] used one of the [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] at the time of the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The T-81 appears in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s novel ''[[Specter of the Past]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
